steps.description: The processing and analysis of expression data were performed using the statistical software R and Bioconductor.
For all Affymetrix CEL files the background were corrected and the expression were normalized using robust multiarray average (RMA).

raw_text: The processing and analysis of expression data were performed using the statistical software R and Bioconductor. For all Affymetrix CEL files the background were corrected and the expression were normalized using robust multiarray average (RMA).
